name: Andrea Stark
likes: Soy and beeswax scented candles (vanilla, sandalwood, fig)
Italian red wine, especially Barolo and Chianti
Travel, especially Italy and the Mediterranean
dislikes: Cookbooks (feels like pressure to cook more)
Anything with lavender scent (mild skin reaction)
interests: Growing heirloom herbs in raised beds
Planning a future Italy family trip
notes: Late-30s mom of three. Prefers thoughtful experiences and quality keepsakes over big shiny purchases. Allergic to lavender on skin. Values handwritten notes that come with the gift.
